candidates.question: Calculate the shipping cost for a 14 kg package at a rate of 1.2 per kg. Using that cost as an hourly wage, determine an annual salary for someone working 37.5 hours a week. Finally, convert that salary using an exchange rate of 1.08.

Find the average speed for covering 1041 kilometers in 3 hours. Then convert that speed from kilometers per hour to miles per hour. Finally, calculate the percentage change from this new speed back to the original average speed.

Calculate the number of days between day 36 and day 359 of the same year. Using that total number of days as a count of items, determine how many boxes you need if each box holds 24 items. Finally, find the utilization percentage when you use that number of boxes to fill the slots equal to the original number of days.
Find the remainder when 558 is divided by 4. Then, count how many numbers from the list [15, 52, 84, 80, 31, 94, 25] are greater than that remainder. Finally, decrease that count by five percent.

Compute the population standard deviation for the set [89, 15, 85, 93, 24, 63, 86, 39]. Then, determine how many whole times the number 13 fits into that result. Finally, check if this whole number result is greater than the standard deviation you first calculated.
